title: cronsplain epic FINAL JOIN: replay full node --test suite + e2e explain/next; verdict the epic
description: Replay-only epic final join (owns nothing). Depends on T-045 (parser), T-049 (promoted schedule), T-050 (explain), T-051 (CLI + integration) — these four leaves transitively close over the whole DAG, so this verdict cannot pass unless every task is done. Re-runs the full node --test suite and the e2e CLI, verifies zero-deps + source-untouched, and F6 verifier-rotation.
acceptance_criteria: OWNS NOTHING (create/edit no file; replay + verdict only).

FULL SUITE: from projects/cronsplain/ run `node --test` — it discovers test_fields, test_parser, test_schedule, test_explain, test_cli, test_integration. Confirm ALL green and quote the runner summary (tests/pass/fail counts) in the verdict.

E2E replay: run `node bin/cronsplain.js explain <expr>` for a few exprs; run `node bin/cronsplain.js next <expr> --from <ISO> --count N` and HAND-VERIFY the ISO-Z occurrences for (a) a DOM/DOW-OR expr (e.g. '0 0 13 * 5'), (b) a leap-year expr ('0 0 29 2 *'), and (c) EXCLUSIVITY (a --from landing exactly on a match returns the NEXT minute, not that one). Confirm an invalid expr exits non-zero with a clean one-line message and NO stack trace.

HYGIENE: confirm ZERO npm deps (no node_modules/, no dependencies/devDependencies in package.json) and CommonJS (no "type":"module"). Confirm the harness edited NO file outside projects/cronsplain/ (readiness criterion 3: source untouched) — spot-check git status / diff scope.

F6 VERIFIER ROTATION: this final-join approver MUST be an identity distinct from every producer (T-044,045,046,047,048,050,051) AND from the T-049 verdict approver — no sole approver across the epic (ORCHESTRATION.md section 4).

VERDICT: mark the epic done ONLY if all the above hold; otherwise re-open the offending task with a specific REJECTED note (replayable). Record the OPEN-QUESTION taxonomy note for any residual friction to feed the gen-4 audit.
SHARED CONVENTIONS: CommonJS, zero deps, UTC. Run from projects/cronsplain/.

notes.note: EPIC ACCEPTED (independent replay; owns-nothing coordinator join, override used, no separate producer, harness-verifier authored no cronsplain source). Suite via node --test tests/*.js and npm test: 93 pass 0 fail. E2E hand-verified: DOM/DOW-OR union, leap 2028/2032/2036, exclusivity next-minute, invalid expr clean exit1 no stack. Zero deps, CommonJS, git clean, candidates intact, promotion algorithm verbatim. F6 rotation all producer!=approver, 4 distinct approvers, join approver distinct from all producers and from T-049 approver verifier-d. MILESTONE: first non-Python artifact shipped end to end (Node CommonJS). Gen-4 new frictions: (1) node --test false-green: bare node --test finds 0 tests exit 0 due to tests/ + test_ layout vs node default discovery; criterion command imprecise. (2) backtick-in-note shell corruption recurring; use single-quote/backtick-free notes. (3) promotion-verbatim imprecise: promotion severs candidate self-test/vectors dep and renames prefix. Full evidence in verifier report.
